name_cn:
Top Quality with Full Packaging
White in Stock!!️
Brick Store's latest medium Pearl Chain Clutch, iconic rattan pattern, classic letter charm, unique handle design, paired with soft lambskin, elegant and stylish, the highlight is the exquisite chain, making the whole bag more refined, multiple compartments and card slots inside, beautiful and practical
